title: Mercury Holder Glass Antique Tea Silver Light Candle Votive Wedding Decoration
features: This vintage, antique style tea light holder will make a welcome addition to any home
The tea lights are made from glass with a lovely silver pattern on them
Use this as a lovely accessory to a vintage themed wedding
Fill with tea light or small sweets and give customers a stunning wedding favor
Size: 6.5 cm Height x Diameter 5.5 cm at the top, 4.5 cm at the bottom
description: This vintage, antique style tea light holder will make a welcome addition to any place in the home or wedding. Tea lights are made from glass with a pretty silver pattern on them, so that when the tea light is turned on inside, it twinkles and sparkles. Use this as a lovely accessory to a vintage themed wedding. This holder can be filled with tea light or small sweets and give guests a stunning wedding favor. N.B. The tea light candle in the photo does not come with the holder. We also sell a gold version, see our Amazon store for separate
